name: e22-plugins
description: Element 22 plugin catalog — proposal workflow, intake for non-engineers, governance gates, and shared development conventions for Claude Code and Claude Cowork.

plugins.name: proposal-workflow
plugins.description: Element 22's proposal lifecycle for engineers: /propose, /from-design, /promote, the engineering constitution, spec-refiner and drift-monitor agents, and the SOC2 governance overlay.

plugins.name: proposal-intake
plugins.description: Cowork-friendly intake for non-engineering contributors. /draft-proposal turns a plain-language change idea into a structured brief; /proposal-status reports lifecycle state without jargon; auto-triggered skills handle ad-hoc change ideas and terminology questions.
